case_title: COLLECTION BUREAU OF SAN JOSE vs. PARKE, TINA et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $116.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF COLLECTION BUREAU OF SAN JOSE A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT PARKE, TINA PARKE, WYATT
